paper.title: Human-in-the-Loop Nugget Annotation for Accountable LLM-as-a-Judge Evaluations

paper_linked_artifacts.description: Paper footnote 1 web demo. The retrieved self-contained HTML includes the annotation interface, embedded demonstration data and nugget banks, export logic, canonicalization and matching prompts, and an OpenRouter client call. It is a mutable web artifact, not an immutable paper-version attachment.

scope_note: Source acquisition only. Extraction was checked at the abstract, workflow, quality-control, appendix, and references regions. This manifest does not claim a deep paper review, validate the demo's behavior, establish paper-time implementation identity, or establish the absence of unlinked author artifacts. The paper text exposes only the web-demo URL as a release link; broader targeted author/title searches remain part of the queued review task.
